creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
A point release to fix problems in setup.php introduced in 2.9.0.1

Announce message:

    Welcome to phpMyAdmin 2.9.0.2; it fixes the setup script which did
    not work in 2.9.0.1.

    Downloads: http://www.phpmyadmin.net

    Marc Delisle, for the team

Changelog:

    https://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=452515
